args: prof=$HOME/.cache/playwright-mcp-profile; pkill -9 -f "[b]in/playwright-mcp .*$prof" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -9 -f "[c]hrome.*$prof" 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f "$prof"/Singleton* 2>/dev/null || true; exec npx @playwright/mcp@latest --user-data-dir=$prof --config=.claude/playwright-mcp.config.json
